overview.description: The Invesco High Yield Systematic Bond ETF (GTOQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively-managed fund designed to provide exposure to a broad selection of high yield, fixed income securities. GTOQ was launched on Dec 2, 2020 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Here's why investors are piling into junk bonds
data.text: CNBC's Dom Chu discusses why investors are piling into junk bonds with Michael Contopoulos of Richard Bernstein Advisors.
